entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a legume grown as a dry-season crop

entities.name: SUDANO-SAHELIAN ZONE
entities.description: A region in West Africa where groundnut is grown

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographic region of the study

entities.name: ICRISAT SAHELIAN CENTRE
entities.description: The research facility where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period of growth characterized by lack of rain

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to the crop

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Seasonal variation in heat that influences growth and yield

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: The timing of planting used to study effects on phenology and yield

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events such as emergence, flowering, and maturity

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total productivity of the groundnut crop

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The specific weight or quantity of pods produced

entities.name: CROP GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate of biomass accumulation, denoted as B

entities.name: PARTITIONING
entities.description: The allocation of biomass to pods, denoted as p

entities.name: YIELD STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of yield across different environments and cultivars

entities.name: PLANT HABIT
entities.description: The physical growth form of the groundnut plant

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the vegetative parts of the plant used as fodder

entities.name: RADIATION INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The capture of solar energy by the crop canopy

entities.name: POD-FILLING PHASE
entities.description: The specific growth stage during which pods are filled
